AeroNav legal

Terms of Service

Last updated July 8, 2026. These terms describe the basic rules for using AeroNav and its flight-tracking experience.

Use of the Service

AeroNav is a live flight-tracking and AI copilot experience built for aviation discovery, personal sky history, and flight awareness. Flight data, alerts, weather, delay estimates, and AI responses are informational and should not be used as the only source for safety-critical, operational, airport, airline, or emergency decisions.

Your Account

The product is designed around private memory: flights you inspect, personal logbook moments, stats, streaks, and ranks. You are responsible for using your account or device history respectfully and keeping access to your device secure.

Fair Use

  • Do not abuse, scrape, overload, reverse engineer, or interfere with AeroNav or connected services.
  • Do not use AeroNav to harass people, track private individuals in a harmful way, or violate applicable law.
  • Do not misrepresent AI copilot responses as official airline, airport, aviation authority, or emergency guidance.

Availability

Flight-tracking coverage, alerts, AI responses, weather layers, and airport delay information may be delayed, incomplete, unavailable, or changed without notice. AeroNav may update features, modify pages, or pause access as the service evolves.

Contact

Questions about these terms can be sent to aeronav3d@gmail.com.

AeroNav Other apps show you the sky. AeroNav remembers yours.
Home About Features Terms of service Privacy Contact

Free, ad-free, and built with private on-device history for aviation lovers.
